name: Polaroid
description: Instant photos strewn across a desk, each one a small color field in a white frame — every redraw reshuffles the shoebox.

code.style: --photo: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( /* frame and photo share one emitted tilt so the print turns as one */ --pa: @r(-10deg, 10deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 14%; top: 8%; width: 72%; height: 84%; background: var(--color1); box-shadow: calc(12px / @Y) calc(16px / @Y) 0 rgba(70, 50, 20, 0.22); transform: rotate(@var(--pa)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 21%; top: 14%; width: 58%; height: 56%; background: var(--photo); transform: rotate(@var(--pa)); transform-origin: 50% 64%; transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
